world.title: Compound Chinese surnames come from historic figures, ancient states; fewer than 100 remain

business.title: YES Bank Q4 biz update: Loans rise 11%, deposits grow 12% YoY
business.description: YES Bank reported steady Q4 growth, with advances rising 6% QoQ and deposits outpacing at 9%, improving its CD ratio to 85.4%. Strong CASA traction supported margins, though reliance on certificates of deposit increased. Liquidity remained comfortable. Overall, improving deposit quality and a stronger liability franchise signal a more balanced outlook despite measured loan growth.

ai.title: Samsung, Mistral AI discuss cooperation in AI memory sector
ai.description: Samsung Electronics and French AI startup Mistral AI explored cooperation in AI memory. Mistral AI CEO Arthur Mensch met Samsung's head of device solutions. This follows French President Emmanuel Macron's visit to Seoul. Mistral AI seeks stable semiconductor supply for its AI models. The discussions aim to ensure reliable chip supply amid tight market conditions.

ai.title: Gujarat High Court issues AI policy; bans use in decision-making, mandates human oversight
ai.description: While allowing AI for research and translation, the Gujarat High Court policy mandates that all outputs must be verified by a "qualified human officer".
